mapper.insert: INSERT INTO contest_post ( contest_id, subtitle, poster_url, start_date, end_date, host_name, target, total_prize, first_prize, tags, past_winner_info, apply_url, contact_info ) VALUES ( #{postId}, #{subtitle}, #{posterUrl}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{hostName}, #{target}, #{totalPrize}, #{firstPrize}, #{tags}, #{pastWinnerInfo}, #{applyUrl}, #{contactInfo} )
mapper.select: SELECT b.post_id, b.title, b.view_count, b.created_at, ct.category_name, c.subtitle, c.host_name, c.poster_url, c.start_date, c.end_date, c.target, c.total_prize, c.first_prize FROM board b JOIN contest_post c ON b.post_id = c.contest_id JOIN category ct ON b.category_id = ct.category_id WHERE b.board_code = 3 ORDER BY b.created_at DESC

SELECT b.post_id, b.user_id, b.title, c.subtitle, b.content, b.view_count, b.created_at, c.host_name, c.poster_url, c.start_date, c.end_date, c.target, c.total_prize, c.first_prize, c.apply_url, c.contact_info, GROUP_CONCAT(cat.category_name ORDER BY cat.category_name SEPARATOR ',') AS category_names, GROUP_CONCAT(cat.category_id ORDER BY cat.category_id SEPARATOR ',') AS category_ids FROM board b JOIN contest_post c ON b.post_id = c.contest_id LEFT JOIN contest_category cc ON b.post_id = cc.contest_id LEFT JOIN category cat ON cc.category_id = cat.category_id WHERE b.board_code = 3 AND b.is_deleted = false AND b.post_id = #{postId} GROUP BY b.post_id

SELECT b.post_id, b.title, b.view_count, b.created_at, c.subtitle, c.host_name, c.poster_url, c.start_date, c.end_date, c.target, c.total_prize, c.first_prize, GROUP_CONCAT(cat.category_name ORDER BY cat.category_name SEPARATOR ',') AS category_names FROM board b JOIN contest_post c ON b.post_id = c.contest_id LEFT JOIN contest_category cc ON b.post_id = cc.contest_id LEFT JOIN category cat ON cc.category_id = cat.category_id WHERE b.board_code = 3 AND b.is_deleted = 0
AND (end_date >= CURDATE() OR end_date is null)
GROUP BY b.post_id
HAVING ( COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN cat.category_id IN
#{id}
THEN cat.category_id END) > 0 )
ORDER BY c.end_date ASC
ORDER BY b.created_at DESC
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE contest_post SET subtitle = #{subtitle}, poster_url = #{posterUrl}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, host_name = #{hostName}, first_prize = #{firstPrize}, apply_url = #{applyUrl}, contact_info = #{contactInfo} WHERE contest_id = #{postId}
mapper.select: SELECT b.post_id, b.title, b.view_count, b.created_at, b.board_code, c.subtitle, c.host_name, c.poster_url, c.start_date, c.end_date, c.target, c.total_prize, c.first_prize, GROUP_CONCAT(cat.category_name ORDER BY cat.category_name SEPARATOR ',') AS category_names FROM board b JOIN contest_post c ON b.post_id = c.contest_id LEFT JOIN contest_category cc ON b.post_id = cc.contest_id LEFT JOIN category cat ON cc.category_id = cat.category_id WHERE b.board_code = 3 AND b.is_deleted = 0 AND (end_date >= CURDATE() OR end_date is null) GROUP BY b.post_id ORDER BY b.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT b.post_id) FROM board b JOIN contest_post c ON b.post_id = c.contest_id LEFT JOIN contest_category cc ON b.post_id = cc.contest_id
LEFT JOIN category cat ON cc.category_id = cat.category_id
WHERE b.board_code = #{boardCode} AND b.is_deleted = 0
AND cc.category_id IN
#{id}
